description_long: This trumpet features a striking, steampunk-inspired design with a wide, flared bell and ornate, swirling gold patterns on a dark metallic surface. The body is accented with deep red and bronze tones, giving it an antique, handcrafted appearance. A bulbous, dark red grip and a cylindrical, brass-colored canister are attached to the main body, suggesting a hybrid between a traditional trumpet and a fantastical device. The instrument's tubing is robust and features decorative elements, with visible seams and rivets enhancing its industrial aesthetic. The bell is particularly prominent, with a large opening and a gradual flare, while the mouthpiece area is compact and integrated into the overall form. The surface finish is matte with subtle highlights, and the object appears solid and well-crafted.
description: A steampunk-style trumpet with a wide, ornate bell, dark metallic body, and decorative gold and red accents. The design is robust, antique, and features industrial details.
description_view_0: The trumpet is viewed head-on from the bell, showcasing the wide, flared opening and the dark, shadowed interior.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the ornate gold patterns, the attached canister, and the full length of the instrument's body and bell.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the mouthpiece area, the cylindrical canister, and the intricate end cap details.
description_view_3: An angled side view displays the grip, canister, and the decorative elements along the body and bell.
attribute_bell_flare: The bell is wide with a gradual, pronounced flare, giving it a dramatic and open appearance.
attribute_valve_configuration: A single, prominent valve is visible, positioned near the grip and canister, with a piston-like design.
attribute_leadpipe_curvature: The leadpipe is gently curved, smoothly connecting the mouthpiece area to the main body.
attribute_tuning_slide_location: The main tuning slide is integrated near the rear, adjacent to the canister and grip, with a straight, compact shape.
